title: 2 Sets Reusable Cutlery Set with Case, Travel Fork Knife Spoon Set, Portable Plastic Cutlery Set for Picnic School Office Lunch (Pink, Yellow)
features: Package includes: 2 sets of travel utensils with case. Each set includes 1 spoon, 1 knife, 1 fork and 1travel utensils box.
Food grade material: This lunch utensil set does not contain any harmful substances, so everyone can use it with confidence. Our dishes are dishwasher safe.
Easy to carry: The reusable utensils set is small and light, it can be put in a lunch box, backpack, or even a pocket for easy carrying and storage.
A practical gift: The portable utensil set has a smooth surface and soft colors. Our utensil set is the perfect gift for family or friends.
Versatile use: This camping utensils with case can be used for everyday meals, or take it to school, work lunches or travel, camping, flying, dining out to suit your lifestyle needs.
description: SPECIFICATIONS Packaging includes: 2 portable utensil set with case Spoon length:6.5 inch Fork length:6.1 inch Knife length:7.3 inch Portable case:8.1x2x1 inch DINNER KNIFE The serrations of the table knife are very sharp, making it easy to cut food. Fine workmanship with rounded edges. DINNER FORK Ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip. Robust and easy to penetrate food. DINNER SPOONS The deepened and wider design makes our spoons more suitable for scooping soup. The edges are smooth, so don't worry about hurting your mouth. TRAVEL UTENSIL CASE The utensil box with the snap design is very convenient to open the lid. It can store cutlery and spoons well. When you are going out, bring this set of cutlery, the knife, fork and spoon can fully meet your needs. The cutlery box is not only convenient, but also prevents the cutlery from being contaminated. 100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE If you have any doubts or are not satisfied with the product, please feel free to contact us and we will provide you with the best solution, your satisfaction is our main concern.
